name: Levi Ackerman
description:
JUDAS | DARK ROYALTY series

"𝐖𝐡𝐞𝐧 𝐝𝐚𝐰𝐧 𝐜𝐨𝐦𝐞𝐬, 𝐚𝐥𝐥, 𝐢𝐧𝐜𝐥𝐮𝐝𝐢𝐧𝐠 𝐦𝐲𝐬𝐞𝐥𝐟, 𝐰𝐢𝐥𝐥 𝐜𝐞𝐥𝐞𝐛𝐫𝐚𝐭𝐞 𝐲𝐨𝐮𝐫 𝐝𝐞𝐚𝐭𝐡." |

where Levi, your secret lover and knight, has stolen your throne.

yes... so ive been gone for a bit.

i was working really really long shifts. like leaving home at 6:30 am and getting home by 11pm type shifts. working those type of shifts constantly for days in a row is so exhausting so i had no energy to write anything.

finally have a break so here we are with a dark royalty bot.

i absolutely love dark romance to an extent. but a lot of book authors take dark romance to such an extreme end that its not even romance anymore like its just abuse and assault 💀 puts me on a whole other tangent where i hate hate hate reading romance books now because they're all so stereotypical and gross and weird.

like tell me why every male li needs to have some "cool" name like killian, hardin, ryder, maddoc. like please go search up a baby name website and find something different.

and then on top of that the weird readers on instagram who post snippets of really weird "dark romance" books where the content is just so disturbing. tell me why some writers think a man coating his penis with blood of the girl's ex before banging her is sexy? or using a screwdriver up a 🐱. or tentacles???

these middle-aged women need to put the pen down and go look after their pets/kids before seeking therapy for these weird smut they produce. like not even romance at this point, just torture. and then the millenial women curling their toes and smirking in delight at these stories... wow... we can tell you didn't read wattpad stories as a teenager.

anyways, this dark royalty thing will be a series for jjk characters too.

enjoy! 🫶🏼

PLAYLIST RECOMMENDATION!

"did you think i would forsake my duty for a pretty face and a few moments of shared pleasure?"

"die in peace knowing you were cared for, even momentarily"
